hero.title: Professional web solutions

about.heading: Software Engineer
about.headingHighlight: with a passion for the web.
about.p1: Quality is always at the core: clean code, thoughtful architecture and comprehensive testing. I deliver results that make an impact.
about.p2: With an open, transparent communication style, I guide clients and teams from the first idea through to the finished product.

services.heading: Services
services.subheading: From corporate websites to complex applications — I build digital solutions that work.

websites.title: Websites
websites.description: Corporate websites and landing pages — modern, responsive and optimized for your target audience.

webapps.title: Web Applications
webapps.description: Interactive web applications with user management, database integration and complex business logic.

quality.title: Quality Assurance
quality.description: Automated tests with Jest and Cypress, CI/CD pipelines and code reviews for sustainably maintainable code.

support.title: Maintenance & Support
support.description: Long-term support for existing projects — updates, bugfixes, performance optimizations and technical support.

consulting.title: Technical Consulting
consulting.description: Technology selection and code audits — sound consulting for sustainable technical solutions.

seo.title: SEO Optimization
seo.description: Technical SEO for better search engine visibility — clean structure, fast loading times and Core Web Vitals.

projects.heading: Selected Projects
projects.subheading: A look at my work — professional solutions for businesses and personal projects.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.disclaimerText: The contents of this site have been created with the greatest possible care. However, no guarantee can be given for the correctness, completeness and timeliness of the contents.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Text: This website processes personal data only to the extent necessary to provide the website and enable contact.
privacy.section2Text: For appointment scheduling I use Calendly (Calendly LLC, USA). Name, email address, and appointment details are transmitted to and processed by Calendly in the USA. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR. Privacy policy: calendly.com/privacy.
privacy.section3Text: This website stores your language and theme preferences exclusively locally in the browser (localStorage). This data does not leave your device.
privacy.section4Text: This website uses Google Fonts. When loading the fonts, your IP address is transmitted to Google. For more information, please refer to Google's privacy policy.
